特記事項: 【合併】Intercultural Communication（総合政策学部）/異文化間コミュニケーション論（総合政策学部）
授業方法: This course will include core face-to-face lessons, as well as Start-up Week and Flex Hours on-demand lessons. It follows a structured format combining pre-lecture preparation, interactive lectures, and unit-based assessment. Students are required to complete assigned readings (8 - 15 pages) before each lecture to prepare for in-class learning. Lectures are based on these readings and supported by slides and a handout for guided note-taking. During each lecture, students complete interactive Lecture Tasks that involve writing and discussing (in English) with classmates. Task Sheets used for these activities are submitted on LUNA by the end of the lecture day. The course is organized into three units, each consisting of three content lectures followed by a Unit Test covering the material from those lectures.All course reading and handout materials will be distributed to students via the course LUNA site. Students are expected to access and use electronic course materials on their own. No printed materials will be provided.

第1回:
[Start-up Week] Online class (on-demand format) / 《90 min》 Course guidance
Visit the course LUNA website "Week 0 (Startup Period)" folder for the on-demand lecture link and materials:
https://luna.kwansei.ac.jp/lms/contents?idnumber=2026294191000201#courseContent
第2回: [Core Week ①] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》Reasons to study intercultural communication
第3回: [Core Week ②] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》What is culture?
第4回: [Core Week ③] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》Intercultural communication flexibility
第5回: [Flex Hours] (On-demand format) / 《90 min》Test Review Activity
第7回: [Core Week ⑤] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》Analyzing cultural value dimensions
第8回: Core Week ⑥] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》Culture shock
第9回: [Core Week ⑦] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》Re-entry (reverse) culture shock
第11回: Core Week ⑨] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》Verbal communication styles
第12回: [Core Week ⑩] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》Non-verbal communication styles
第13回: [Core Week ⑪] (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》Stereotypes and biases
第15回: [Classes and Examinations Period] Week 1 (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》In-class Writing Assignment
Review course materials and compete the In-class Writing Assignment
トピック.授業計画1: Most weekly sessions will follow a similar pattern. Students will carefully read an academic English text on the topic of that week, then attend the in-person lecture, where they will take notes and complete short writing / discussion tasks. Three sessions are designated to complete the three Unit Tests.

教科書/Required texts0: All reading materials will be provided by the instructor on LUNA. Students can expect approximately 8-15 pages of academic English reading preparation per week.
参考文献・資料/Reference books0: Ting-Toomey, S., & Chung, L. C. (2012). Understanding Intercultural Communication (2nd Ed.). Oxford University Press: New York.
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
